hero.secondary: A sudden breakdown, an urgent code upgrade, or a planned renovation? {entreprise} secures your home with professional, reliable, and guaranteed installations.

pourquoi.title: Why choose us?
pourquoi.primary: Live peacefully, without fear of the next breakdown.
pourquoi.secondary: An outdated installation is more than a nuisance: it's a risk to your family. We step in to restore comfort, safety, and compliance to your home.

cartes.title: Unexpected breakdowns
cartes.text: Outages, short circuits, repeated tripping. We diagnose and repair quickly.

cartes.title: At-risk installations
cartes.text: Old panels, ungrounded outlets, faulty wiring. We bring your home up to NF C 15-100 standards.

cartes.title: Pending projects
cartes.text: Renovation, extension, home automation, charging stations. We design an installation built to last.

cartes.title: Free diagnostic
cartes.text: On-site visit or phone call to understand your needs.

cartes.title: Transparent quote
cartes.text: Clear, detailed, no-obligation pricing sent within 48 hours.

cartes.title: Clean intervention
cartes.text: Work carried out respecting deadlines and your home.

cartes.name: Mathias Ostanel
cartes.text: Electrical work for our renovation home, tailored to our needs, very clean work.

cartes.name: Elysa Thomas
cartes.text: Exceptional responsiveness and availability, friendly and highly professional electrician, fast and efficient.

cartes.name: Julie Martet
cartes.text: Responsive and professional electrician. The work is neat. I recommend.

cartes.name: Clara Navail
cartes.text: Great electrician, serious work, friendly person, quick troubleshooting! A young guy who is motivated! Everything was top!

cartes.name: Jean Corentin
cartes.text: Remy is a true professional! Always answers calls even after the work is done. Excellent electrician, neat work, nothing to complain about. Highly recommend!

cartes.name: Ivoa Bille
cartes.text: Mr. Fernandez is probably the best craftsman we've had the pleasure to work with. Very responsive, organized, considerate, gives good advice, efficient, and much more...

faq.title: FAQ
faq.secondary: Can't find your answer? Call us, we will always take the time to respond.

questions.question: Do you work throughout Lot-et-Garonne?
questions.answer: No, we cover Casteljaloux, Cocumont, Marmande, Miramont-de-Guyenne, and Tonneins, as well as neighboring municipalities.

questions.question: Is the quote really free?
questions.answer: Absolutely. We travel for free to assess your project and send a detailed quote within 48 hours, with no obligation.

questions.question: Are you available for emergencies?
questions.answer: Yes, we offer on-call service for critical breakdowns (total outage, short circuit, safety issues). Call us, we'll organize immediately.

questions.question: What guarantees do you offer?
questions.answer: All our work is covered by our 10-year warranty, as well as manufacturer parts and labor warranties.
